# Gramakam Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Gramakam is an annual theatre festival website built with Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Firebase.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS with custom theme (earth tones, maroon, black, cream)
- **Animations:** Framer Motion
- **Backend:** Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Storage)
- **Hosting:** Vercel

## Design Guidelines
- Minimal, modern, cultural, elegant
- Earth tones, deep maroon (#800020), black, cream (#FFF8DC), white
- Serif headings (Playfair Display), sans-serif body (Inter)
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Subtle scroll animations, smooth hover transitions

## Project Structure
- `/app` - Next.js App Router pages
- `/components` - Reusable UI components
- `/lib` - Firebase config and utilities
- `/public` - Static assets and images
- `/types` - TypeScript type definitions

## Development Rules
- Use modular, reusable components
- Mobile-first responsive at every step
- Lazy load images, optimize performance
- Keep bundle size minimal
- Clean, well-typed TypeScript code
